content: Adds an indicator of whether or not packet-level compression is enabled to network GUIs.
Adds missing `GetInputPins` and `GetOutputPins` methods to `Class.AudioTextToSpeech` and `Class.AudioSpeechToText`.

Adds `BatchGetAsync` to ordered data stores, allowing retrieval of multiple key-value pairs in a single request. Accepts an array of up to 100 string keys and returns a dictionary mapping each key to its value. Gated by `DataStoreEnableOrderedBatchGetAsync`.
In the New Luau Type Solver, fixes an issue where variadic function arguments were not pushed into lambdas.
Fixes an issue where some terrain brushes would ignore the terrain in favor of parts.
In the New Luau Type Solver, fixes a bug where refinements of variables were "cleared" by using a variable in a loop.
In the New Luau Type Solver, autocomplete on refinements of `any` will no longer exclude results *from* the refinement.
Fixes potential improper occlusion culling by meshes with a `MeshSize` value of `0`.
Fixes an issue where `Class.VoiceChatService.IsVoiceEnabledForUserIdAsync` encountered an Http 403 error whenever it was used in Studio.
Fixes an issue with the Acoustic Simulation feature where creating a `Class.AudioEmitter` or `Class.AudioListener` would simulate reflections/reverberation incorrectly for a few frames.
Fixes a bug where when exporting an asset, the file dialog would default to a system folder instead of the user's documents folder.
Fixes mouse jitter when dragging the 3D camera view.
